programme.desc: A mom decides to go all-in and purchase a mega-waterslide for her annual family get-together; she winds up suing a business owner for $8K, claiming everything from delivery to set-up went wrong.

programme.title: Tribunal Justice
programme.desc: Dogs escape their home and wreak lethal havoc on a neighbor's henhouse; the hobby farm owner is injured while trying to save her beloved hens; she sues for damages.

programme.desc: A woman sues her ex-boyfriend and his new wife for thousands in alleged loans; she claims fraudulent credit card use and demands the return of property.
